reasoning: Based on the simulated news from October 2025, Bitcoin has been experiencing high volatility. After dropping to around $105,000 on October 17 (which caused Polymarket odds for a sub-$100k dip to spike to 70%), the price has rebounded to approximately $111,000-$111,600 as of October 25. The market estimate on October 16 was 57%. With the price recovering and slightly less time remaining before the December 31 deadline (roughly 66 days), time decay reduces the probability of a barrier touch event. However, a drop requires only an ~11% move, which remains well within typical cryptocurrency volatility for a two-month period. Adjusting the historical prediction market quotes for current price recovery and reduced time-to-decay yields a probability estimate of around 54%.
